/usr/local/vitasdk/bin/arm-vita-eabi-gcc  -Wl,-q -Wl,-q -Wall -O2 -nostdlib -fno-builtin -Wl,-z,nocopyreloc CMakeFiles/boot_recovery.dir/boot_recovery.c.obj -o boot_recovery  -ltaihenForKernel_stub -lSceCtrlForDriver_stub -lSceIofilemgrForDriver_stub -lSceThreadmgrForDriver_stub -lSceSysmemForDriver_stub -lSceAppMgrForDriver_stub
